title: Horror$Place Event Contract Schema v1
description: Schema for defining Surprise.Events! and Vanish.Dissipation! sequences, including triggers, required evidence, and metric impacts.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for the event contract.

description.description: Brief description of the event's nature and occurrence.

event_type.description: Type of event, categorizing its core mechanic.

tier.description: Safety tier as defined by the Rivers of Blood Charter.

trigger_conditions.description: List of conditions that must be met for the event to activate (e.g., invariant IDs, player state).

required_evidence.description: List of evidence types that must be present in the region or player's inventory for the event to be valid.

metrics_impact.description: Defines the immediate impact this event has on entertainment metrics.

duration_estimate_ms.description: Estimated duration of the event in milliseconds, for pacing calculations.

stage_sequence.description: Ordered list of stages defining the event's progression.
